test.name: Verify Activity Summary Navigation

kw.name: Launch Application
Open Browser
kw.msg: WebDriverException: Message: unknown error: net::ERR_NAME_NOT_RESOLVED (Session info: chrome=147.0.7727.56) Stacktrace: 0 chromedriver 0x000000010537bab4 cxxbridge1$str$ptr + 3192864 1 chromedriver 0x0000000105373a84 cxxbridge1$str$ptr + 3160048 2 chromedriver 0x0000000104e3f7c0 _RNvCs10ygTOo3JCa_7___rustc35___rust_no_alloc_shim_is_unstable_v2 + 75348 3 chromedriver 0x0000000104e37868 _RNvCs10ygTOo3JCa_7___rustc35___rust_no_alloc_shim_is_unstable_v2 + 42748 4 chromedriver 0x0000000104e29f44 cxxbridge1$string$len + 5152 5 chromedriver 0x0000000104e2ba48 cxxbridge1$string$len + 12068 6 chromedriver 0x0000000104e2a3ac cxxbridge1$string$len + 6280 7 chromedriver 0x0000000104e29b98 cxxbridge1$string$len + 4212 8 chromedriver 0x0000000104e29884 cxxbridge1$string$len + 3424 9 chromedriver 0x0000000104e27448 chromedriver + 226376 10 chromedriver 0x0000000104e27f14 chromedriver + 229140 11 chromedriver 0x0000000104e42ca4 _RNvCs10ygTOo3JCa_7___rustc35___rust_no_alloc_shim_is_unstable_v2 + 88888 12 chromedriver 0x0000000104ec7f04 _RNvCs10ygTOo3JCa_7___rustc35___rust_no_alloc_shim_is_unstable_v2 + 634264 13 chromedriver 0x0000000104ec7448 _RNvCs10ygTOo3JCa_7___rustc35___rust_no_alloc_shim_is_unstable_v2 + 631516 14 chromedriver 0x0000000104e7ce50 _RNvCs10ygTOo3JCa_7___rustc35___rust_no_alloc_shim_is_unstable_v2 + 326884 15 chromedriver 0x0000000105339240 cxxbridge1$str$ptr + 2920364 16 chromedriver 0x000000010533ca20 cxxbridge1$str$ptr + 2934668 17 chromedriver 0x000000010531f1f4 cxxbridge1$str$ptr + 2813792 18 chromedriver 0x000000010533d2a0 cxxbridge1$str$ptr + 2936844 19 chromedriver 0x000000010531001c cxxbridge1$str$ptr + 2751880 20 chromedriver 0x0000000105362980 cxxbridge1$str$ptr + 3090156 21 chromedriver 0x0000000105362afc cxxbridge1$str$ptr + 3090536 22 chromedriver 0x00000001053736dc cxxbridge1$str$ptr + 3159112 23 libsystem_pthread.dylib 0x00000001831082e4 _pthread_start + 136 24 libsystem_pthread.dylib 0x00000001831030fc thread_start + 8
kw.doc: Opens a new browser instance to the optional ``url``.

kw.name: Set Screenshot Directory
kw.doc: Sets the directory for captured screenshots.

kw.name: Login App
kw.doc: Perform successful login with valid credentials.

kw.name: Navigate To Activity Summary
kw.doc: Navigate to Activity Summary under Reports
